metadata.name: Generate a Farm Land Lease Agreement

description: A landowner and a farmer need to generate a simple cash rent lease agreement for a parcel of land.

nodes.task_description: Gather the key terms of the agreement: landowner and tenant names, legal description of the property, annual rent per acre, and lease duration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all the necessary information.

nodes.task_description: Generate a standard farm lease agreement document using the provided terms.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a draft lease agreement in PDF format.

nodes.task_description: Send the agreement to both parties for review and digital signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the document for signature.
